body:
## Problem

The `/vs` comparison hub page is in the sitemap at priority 0.9 (`api/sitemap.js:463`) but `api/meta/[...path].js` has **no handler for `path === '/vs'`**.

Only individual comparison pages (`/vs/<slug1>-vs-<slug2>`) have SSR meta (line 211). The hub index falls through to the generic SPA fallback: title = "MetalForge" + generic description, zero JSON-LD.

## Fix

Add to `api/meta/[...path].js` after the individual vs-page handler (around line 240):

```javascript
// /vs hub index
if (path === '/vs') {
  return {
    title: `Metal Drummer Gear Comparisons — Side-by-Side Kit & Setup | ${SITE_NAME}`,
    description: 'Compare drum kits and gear setups of 60+ metal legends side by side. Joey Jordison vs Lars Ulrich, George Kollias vs Flo Mounier, and more.',
    image: `${BASE_URL}/images/og/compare-preview.png`,
    type: 'website',
    url: `${BASE_URL}/vs`,
    articleSchema: JSON.stringify({
      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
      '@type': 'CollectionPage',
      name: 'Metal Drummer Gear Comparisons',
      description: 'Side-by-side comparisons of drum kits and gear setups for 60+ professional metal drummers',
      url: `${BASE_URL}/vs`,
      publisher: { '@type': 'Organization', name: 'MetalForge', url: BASE_URL },
    }),
    breadcrumbSchema: [
      { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
      { name: 'Drummer Comparisons', url: `${BASE_URL}/vs` },
    ],
  };
}
```

## Files to Touch

- `api/meta/[...path].js` — add `path === '/vs'` handler

## Quality Gate

- `curl -s https://metalforge.io/api/meta/vs | jq '.title'` → returns keyword-matched title
- `jq '.articleSchema'` → returns CollectionPage JSON-LD string
- Title ≤ 60 chars, description ≤ 160 chars

## Estimated Uplift

Ranks the /vs hub for "metal drummer gear comparison" queries. Pairs with the per-page Article schema (#1189) and FAQPage (#1331) already in queue.

## Done

- [ ] `/vs` hub returns keyword-matched title in SSR
- [ ] CollectionPage JSON-LD present in SSR response
- [ ] BreadcrumbList 2-level hierarchy present
title: SEO: /vs hub page missing SSR meta + CollectionPage schema — serves generic fallback
